query: SELECT w.id, w.full_name, w.status, w.group_id, g.name as group_name FROM workers w LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON w.group_id = g.id ORDER BY w.group_id; SELECT id, name FROM `groups`; SELECT worker_id, event_type, event_time FROM attendance_events WHERE DATE(event_time) = '2026-02-01' LIMIT 20;
